# new game

> new game is a browser-based game hub at https://www.jackdu2.me with a daily English word-category puzzle, lightweight account login, AAA guide briefs, a forum-style community surface, and a Pro membership page.

## Key Pages

- Home and daily puzzle: https://www.jackdu2.me/
- How to play: https://www.jackdu2.me/how-to-play
- Puzzle archive: https://www.jackdu2.me/archive
- Guides: https://www.jackdu2.me/guides
- Today's guide brief: https://www.jackdu2.me/guides/today
- Forum: https://www.jackdu2.me/forum
- Pro membership: https://www.jackdu2.me/membership
- Login: https://www.jackdu2.me/login

## Product Summary

new game gives players a short daily word puzzle built around 16 English words and 4 hidden categories. Players can solve groups, unlock answers after progress, save completion history with Supabase Auth, and share results.

The site is also expanding toward a US-focused game content hub with AAA strategy briefs, forum-style discussion, and premium guide positioning.

## Audience

- US casual word-game players
- Fans of daily browser puzzles such as Wordle-style games and category puzzles
- Players searching for short game guides, walkthrough summaries, and strategy notes
- Early community members who want a simple game hub with daily repeat visits

## Launch Message

Play today's 16-word category puzzle, solve four hidden groups, and share your result. The site is free to try and designed for quick daily play.

## Technical Notes

- Framework: Next.js
- Database and auth: Supabase
- Hosting: Vercel
- Primary domain: https://www.jackdu2.me
